title: Inbox Triage and Reply Drafts for Web Design Agencies
metaDescription: Done-for-you email triage and reply drafting for web design agencies. Sorted inbox, drafted replies in your voice, and faster client responses every day.
excerpt: Your inbox sorted by priority and replies drafted in your voice, so client questions, scope changes, and new leads get answered the same business day.

sections.intro:
If you run a web design or development agency, your inbox is the bottleneck. New project inquiries land next to vendor invoices, client feedback on staging links, scope change requests, and hosting alerts. By the time you finish a deep block of design or build work, there are forty unread threads and no clear way to tell which one actually needs you. Leads cool off, clients feel ignored, and your team waits on you to forward the right thing.

The Ayothedoc AI Operating System installs Inbox Triage and Reply Drafts as a Capability inside your business. The system reads incoming email, sorts it by type and urgency, and writes a draft reply in your voice for anything that needs a human answer. You still hit send. You just stop starting from a blank screen.
sections.fourCFit:
This page is a Capability inside the AIOS. Capabilities are the done-for-you workflows that produce output. They only work because the other three layers are in place.

  • Context: your agency's services, pricing posture, project stages, and tone are loaded in, so drafts sound like you and not a generic assistant.
  • Connections: the system reads your shared inbox, project management tool, and CRM so it knows which clients are active, which leads are warm, and what was last said.
  • Capabilities: triage labels every thread, and a reply draft is written for anything that needs one. This page.
  • Cadence: triage runs continuously through the business day, and a daily digest summarizes what was handled and what still needs you.

The wedge into the AIOS is the free 60-Second Lead Engine, which answers every new inquiry in under sixty seconds with your booking link. Inbox Triage extends that same idea to every other message in your inbox.
sections.whatDoneLooksLike:
When this Capability is installed, here is what shows up in your day:

  • Every inbound email is labeled within minutes: new lead, active client, vendor, internal, billing, or noise.
  • Threads are prioritized so the top of your inbox is the work that actually moves projects and revenue forward.
  • Reply drafts are waiting for you on anything that needs a human send, written in your voice, referencing the right project and the last thing said.
  • New project inquiries get a same-minute acknowledgement with your booking link, in line with the 60-Second Lead Engine.
  • Routine messages (receipt confirmations, calendar pings, status nudges) are filed or archived without you reading them.
  • SLA: new leads acknowledged in under 60 seconds, client emails have a draft ready within 15 minutes during business hours, and a daily 5pm digest tells you what got handled.
sections.howWeInstall:
Installation is the same three-phase path for every AIOS Capability.

  1. Audit (free, about 10 minutes). We look at a week of your real inbox traffic, your project stages, and where replies are getting stuck. You get a written read on what to triage, what to draft, and what to leave alone. Run the audit.
  2. Install (10 business days). We load your services, voice, and active client list into Context, connect your inbox, CRM, and project tool, and ship the triage rules and draft templates. You review drafts for the first week and tell us where to tune.
  3. Operate (ongoing). The system runs on Cadence. We add one new automation per week, refine drafts based on your edits, and report on volume handled. See plans.
sections.expectedResults:
Real ranges we see at web design and development agencies after the first 30 days:

  • 6 to 12 hours per week per principal returned from inbox work, mostly from not re-reading threads and not writing the same answer twice.
  • Lead response time drops from hours or days to under 60 seconds on first touch.
  • Active client emails answered same business day, with a clear paper trail per project.
  • Fewer dropped threads at handoff between sales, design, and dev, because triage labels follow the project.
  • Standing guarantee: the AIOS recovers 40 or more hours a month across your team, or we keep working free until it does.
sections.faq:
Will the replies actually sound like us, or like a generic AI?

Drafts are written from your Context: past replies, your service pages, your pricing posture, and the way your team already talks. You review the first week of drafts and we tune from your edits. After that, most agencies send drafts with light changes or no changes at all.

Do you send replies automatically?

By default, no. A human on your team hits send on anything that goes to a client or lead. The only auto-send is the 60-second acknowledgement to brand-new inquiries, and you approve that template before it goes live. The owner always owns the system.

What about confidential client work and NDAs?

We connect to your inbox with the least access needed to do the job, scope the system to the accounts you choose, and document what is read and written. If a client requires their threads excluded, we exclude them. Nothing about this Capability requires you to change tools or move data out of where it already lives.
